headline: Sanofi (SNY) and Regeneron’s Dupixent Recommended for EU Approval
summary: Sanofi (NASDAQ:SNY) is one of the best cheap stocks under $50 to buy right now. On February 27, Sanofi (NASDAQ:SNY) announced that the European Medicines Agency’s Committee for Medicinal Products for Human Use adopted a positive opinion recommending the approval of Dupixent in the EU to treat chronic spontaneous urticaria. Management reported that the recommendation […]

headline: REGN & SNY's Dupixent Gets CHMP Nod for Pediatric Use in Urticaria
summary: Regeneron and Sanofi win CHMP backing to expand Dupixent use to young CSU patients, with EU and U.S. decisions poised to unlock a new growth avenue.

headline: RBC Capital Maintains Sector Perform on Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Raises Price Target to $765
summary: RBC Capital  analyst Brian Abrahams   maintains Regeneron Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:REGN) with a Sector Perform and raises the price target from $745 to $765.
